findings.description: s3 hints include some configuration property names from the messageIdWhenInvalidLength defaults table (maxMessageId, fixLengthMessageId) but omit maxAndMinMessageId and underLimitMessageId, which are equally important default value identifiers used when min is specified.
findings.source_evidence: Source defaults table row: 'あり | max > min | maxAndMinMessageId（超過時）、underLimitMessageId（不足時）'
